channel.title: Blog on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Making a new Website
item.description: For a long time this website has had a couple of links to contact me, but those days are over. Now I have a brand new Hugo website with a custom written theme complete with A homepage with more social links, and description of my skills An about page with description of who I am A portfolio page to showcase all my projects A blog Why Hugo? The first question is why a site builder?

item.title: The importance of humanities
item.description: Introduction Some adults often say “Recently, math is very important.” or “How about studying science like physics and chemistry?”. In addition, some students say “I don’t have to study Korean or Chinese because math and science are more necessary to me.” However, I think it is wrong to regard humanities as unimportant study like Eric. First Reason First, the reason why humanities is important is because it determines the value of technology.
